result.meeting_context: Joint Administrative Zoning and Subdivision Committee Public Hearing reviewing three development projects including permits, extensions, and lot line adjustments. Committee comprised of Zoning Administrator, City Engineer, and City Attorney representative.

points.speaker: Stephanie Williams
points.text: Consent calendar approved for item at 2134 Old Middlefield Way with no public comments received.
points.source: Stephanie Williams : And not not seeing anyone wishing to speak on the consent calendar, So I will go ahead and approve the consent calendar and this item is appealable to the City Council within 10 calendar days.

points.speaker: Ella Carraccian
points.text: Project includes planned community permit and development review permit for 500 square foot single family home construction.
points.source: Ella Carraccian : So the project includes a request for a planned community permit and development review permit to construct to the 500 square foot single family home.

points.speaker: Ella Carraccian
points.text: Heritage tree removal permit required for one tree on 0.17 acre site due to health conditions and structural risks.
points.source: Ella Carraccian : And the project also includes a heritage tree removal permit to remove one heritage tree and .17 acre project site.

points.speaker: Ella Carraccian
points.text: Project is categorically exempt from CEQA review and includes lot line adjustment to combine two lots into one.
points.source: Ella Carraccian : And it is determination that the project is categorically exempt from the sequel review and also a lock line adjustment to remove an existing line and the side and the proposed project.

points.speaker: Ella Carraccian
points.text: Project complies with P19 Downtown Precise Plan development standards including building height, FAR, setbacks and open space requirements.
points.source: Ella Carraccian : And the project also complies with development and standards, including building hide, FAR setbacks and open space of the downtown.

points.speaker: Jenny Gong
points.text: Current duplex structure is uninhabitable and not rentable due to lack of utilities, new two-story home will improve neighborhood.
points.source: Jenny Gong : The current duplex structure that's currently there on the property is not only it's inhabitable but it's not rentable given that as a lack of utility or anything that in in the current structure and making of a brand new structure, two-story home, it's going to improve the neighborhood as well as the community.

points.speaker: Stephanie Williams
points.text: Planned community permit, development review permit and heritage tree removal permit approved subject to draft findings and conditions.
points.source: Stephanie Williams : And we'll be approving the planned community permit, development review permit and heritage tree removal subject to those draft findings and conditions of approval.

points.speaker: Ed Arango
points.text: Lot line adjustment approved to combine two lots into one on 0.17 acre site subject to conditions and ordinance conformance.
points.source: Ed Arango : I'd like to make a motion to approve the lot line adjustment to remove an existing lot line to combine two lots into one lot on .17 acre project site at 339 Franklin St. subject to the conditions of approval and conformance with the General plan and Zoning Ordinance.

points.speaker: Brittany Whitehill
points.text: One year extension requested for vesting tentative map to create 53 condominium lots and one common lot on 1.25 acre site at 1411-1495 W El Camino Real.
points.source: Brittany Whitehill : The applicant is requesting A1 year extension of a previously approved vesting tentative map to create 53 condominium lots and one condom common lot on an R or on a 1.25 acre project.

points.speaker: Brittany Whitehill
points.text: Project found consistent with El Camino Real Precise Plan and categorically exempt from CEQA under Section 15332 infill development guidelines.
points.source: Brittany Whitehill : Site staff has found that the proposed vesting tentative map extension is consistent with the El Camino real precise plan and mixed-use corridor general planned land use designation as well as the subdivision map.

points.speaker: Steve Saray
points.text: Extension needed to complete construction documents and obtain building permits for Lux Larva development project.
points.source: Steve Saray : But as Brittany mentioned, we're just requesting for a one year extension and so we can get our construction documents and permits in place.

points.speaker: Diana Fizely
points.text: One year extension of vesting tentative map at 1411-1495 W El Camino Real approved unanimously by subdivision committee.
points.source: Diana Fizely : I would like to make a motion to approve the one year extension of the vesting tentative map at 1411 to 1495 W El Camino Real.

points.speaker: Brittany Whitehill
points.text: Lot line adjustment requested at 890 Central Ave to relocate boundary between two existing lots on 0.44 acre site in R1 district.
points.source: Brittany Whitehill : In the R1 Single Family Residential District, the applicant is requesting a lot line adjustment to relocate a lot line between two existing lots on a .44 acre project.

points.speaker: Brittany Whitehill
points.text: Proposed adjustment found consistent with R1 zoning standards and categorically exempt from CEQA under Section 15305 minor alterations.
points.source: Brittany Whitehill : Site staff has found the proposed lot line adjustment is consistent with the R1 zoning standards and low density residential general land use designation as well as the subdivision map.

points.speaker: Ed Arango
points.text: Lot line adjustment at 890 Central Avenue approved subject to conditions and General Plan conformance.
points.source: Ed Arango : I'd like to make a motion to approve the lot line adjustment at 890 Central, subject to the conditions of approval and conformance with the General Plan and Zoning Ordinance.

points.speaker: Stephanie Williams
points.text: All approved items are appealable to City Council within 10 calendar days of committee decision.
points.source: Stephanie Williams : This entire project is available to the City Council within 10 calendar days.

points.speaker: Stephanie Williams
points.text: Meeting adjourned at 4:15 PM after completing all agenda items.
points.source: Stephanie Williams : So we will adjourn this meeting at 4:15 PM.

decisions.text: Stephanie Williams will approve planned community permit, development review permit and heritage tree removal for 339 Franklin Street subject to draft findings and conditions.
decisions.source: Stephanie Williams : And we'll be approving the planned community permit, development review permit and heritage tree removal subject to those draft findings and conditions of approval.

decisions.text: Subdivision Committee approved lot line adjustment at 339 Franklin Street to combine two lots into one subject to conditions and ordinance conformance.
decisions.source: Ed Arango : I'd like to make a motion to approve the lot line adjustment to remove an existing lot line to combine two lots into one lot on .17 acre project site at 339 Franklin St. subject to the conditions of approval and conformance with the General plan and Zoning Ordinance.

decisions.text: Subdivision Committee approved one year extension of vesting tentative map at 1411-1495 W El Camino Real for 53 condominium lots.
decisions.source: Diana Fizely : I would like to make a motion to approve the one year extension of the vesting tentative map at 1411 to 1495 W El Camino Real.

decisions.text: Subdivision Committee approved lot line adjustment at 890 Central Avenue subject to conditions and General Plan conformance.
decisions.source: Ed Arango : I'd like to make a motion to approve the lot line adjustment at 890 Central, subject to the conditions of approval and conformance with the General Plan and Zoning Ordinance.
